def _repository_cache_identity(dep_ref):
    return normalize_repo_url(
        dep_ref.to_github_url(),
        truncate_to_segments=2,
    )


class L0PerRunCache:
    def try_resolve(self, dep_ref, ref):
        return self.cache.get(_repository_cache_identity(dep_ref), ref)


class TieredRefResolver:
    def seed(self, repo_ref, ref, sha):
        dep_ref = self._normalize(repo_ref)
        self._cache.put(_repository_cache_identity(dep_ref), ref, sha)

    def resolve(self, repo_ref):
        dep_ref = self._normalize(repo_ref)
        ref = dep_ref.reference
        key = (_repository_cache_identity(dep_ref), ref)
        return self._cache.get(*key)
